title: New Evas Effect on Plot
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Mon Jun 02, 2008 2:28 pm I wonder what's going to happen with all those news evas. If Kaworu indeed is the EVA-06 pilot, then he might never take control of unit 02. I'm pretty sure everything's going to change drastically. The only bad side in all of this would have been that the first movie was just a remix of the original first episodes, on the contrary of the others...

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon Jun 02, 2008 9:07 pm Perhaps we'll see new angels that are more fierce than the ones we know of. This would also mean if the Zeruel battle is in the new movies it could change quite drastically.

[]:             Quote Post by Master Hand » Tue Jun 03, 2008 12:37 am So true^^^.It really does make one wonder how all this will turn out.Maybe it'll be like the manga where he pilots unit 06 against the remaining angels then reveals himself as the final one.And he uses unit 06 instead of 2 to go down where Lilith is.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Tue Jun 03, 2008 3:08 am Well, it makes me think more and more that the Lilith we can see on the moon might finally be unit 06. I can't wait! It's so frustrating, I want to know what's happening next.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 03, 2008 9:48 am Master Hand wrote: Maybe it'll be like the manga where [Kaworu] pilots unit 06 against the remaining angels then reveals himself as the final one.And he uses unit 06 instead of 2 to go down where Lilith is.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Tue Jun 03, 2008 1:10 pm Yeah, I'm sure we'll all end up a bit disapointed about unit 06 appearing near the end. They just won't have time to introduce all of them early in the movie. Maybe we'll have to wait for the final movie to really see this unit 06.

Article: New Evas Effect on Plot
[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Mon Jun 02, 2008 2:28 pm I wonder what's going to happen with all those news evas. If Kaworu indeed is the EVA-06 pilot, then he might never take control of unit 02. I'm pretty sure everything's going to change drastically. The only bad side in all of this would have been that the first movie was just a remix of the original first episodes, on the contrary of the others...

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon Jun 02, 2008 9:07 pm Perhaps we'll see new angels that are more fierce than the ones we know of. This would also mean if the Zeruel battle is in the new movies it could change quite drastically.

[]:             Quote Post by Master Hand » Tue Jun 03, 2008 12:37 am So true^^^.It really does make one wonder how all this will turn out.Maybe it'll be like the manga where he pilots unit 06 against the remaining angels then reveals himself as the final one.And he uses unit 06 instead of 2 to go down where Lilith is.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Tue Jun 03, 2008 3:08 am Well, it makes me think more and more that the Lilith we can see on the moon might finally be unit 06. I can't wait! It's so frustrating, I want to know what's happening next.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 03, 2008 9:48 am Master Hand wrote: Maybe it'll be like the manga where [Kaworu] pilots unit 06 against the remaining angels then reveals himself as the final one.And he uses unit 06 instead of 2 to go down where Lilith is.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Tue Jun 03, 2008 1:10 pm Yeah, I'm sure we'll all end up a bit disapointed about unit 06 appearing near the end. They just won't have time to introduce all of them early in the movie. Maybe we'll have to wait for the final movie to really see this unit 06.
